regions.content:
1. 正面安装推荐使用6 x M8 ↧ 7螺纹孔;
  2. 背面安装推荐使用4 x ⌀6.60通孔。
regions.content_en:
1. 正面安装推荐使用6 x M8 ↧ 7螺纹孔;
  2. 背面安装推荐使用4 x ⌀6.60通孔。

labels.label_text_original: 1、正面安装推荐使用6 x M8 ↧ 7螺纹孔;
labels.translation_en_simple: 1. Front: use 6 x M8 ↧ 7 tapped holes
labels.translation_en_full: 1. For front mounting, it is recommended to use 6 x M8 ↧ 7 threaded holes;

labels.label_text_original: 2、背面安装推荐使用4 x ⌀6.60通孔。
labels.translation_en_full: 2. For back mounting, it is recommended to use 4 x ⌀6.60 through holes.

records.label_text_original: 1、正面安装推荐使用6 x M8 ↧ 7螺纹孔;
records.translation_en_simple: 1. Front: use 6 x M8 ↧ 7 tapped holes
records.translation_en_full: 1. For front mounting, it is recommended to use 6 x M8 ↧ 7 threaded holes;

records.label_text_original: 2、背面安装推荐使用4 x ⌀6.60通孔。
records.translation_en_full: 2. For back mounting, it is recommended to use 4 x ⌀6.60 through holes.
